name: revolv-offermesh
description: Revolv — SmartNFT offer network powered by the OfferMesh SaaS/protocol engine. Brands mint verifiable offers; agents discover, reserve, and redeem under scoped mandates; brands pay per verified outcome. Local proof-first; no live DUAL writes.

scripts.test:all: node scripts/check.mjs && node scripts/smoke.mjs && node scripts/smoke-mcp.mjs && node scripts/smoke-persistence.mjs && node scripts/smoke-production.mjs
